info.name: Verified Portal ŌĆö User API
info.description:
User routes mounted at `/api`. Set `baseUrl` (e.g. http://localhost:5000) to match your server PORT.

**Cookies:** Login sets `accessToken` and `refreshToken` httpOnly cookies. Postman stores them per domain if you use the same `baseUrl` for follow-up requests.

**Refresh / logout:** Can use cookies from login, or send `refreshToken` in JSON body / `Authorization: Bearer <refreshToken>` for refresh.

request.description:
**201** `{ "ok": true, "user": { id, name, email, role, isActive, createdAt, updatedAt } }`

`role` optional: `"ADMIN"` | `"HR"` (default HR in service if omitted).

Refresh token source (first match): cookie `refreshToken`, **or** body `refreshToken`, **or** `Authorization: Bearer <refreshToken>`.

**200** `{ "ok": true, "message": "Token refreshed successfully", "accessToken": "jwt..." }` ŌĆö also sets `accessToken` cookie.
Same as refresh; uses Bearer header instead of body.

Uses cookie `refreshToken` only. Clears auth cookies.

**200** `{ "ok": true, "message": "Logged out successfully" }`

`newPassword` must differ from `currentPassword`.

**200** `{ "ok": true, "message": "Password changed successfully. Please login again." }` ŌĆö all refresh tokens for user are revoked.
